name: Mango Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, toss shrimp with fresh lime juice. Sprinkle generously with Bon Appetit seasoning. Set aside.
2. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add pasta and cook until just al dente, about 8-10 minutes. Drain.
3. In a large non-stick skillet over medium heat, saute red bell pepper and shallot in sesame oil until the bell pepper is almost soft but not brown. Add cilantro and shrimp. Cook until shrimp turns pink, stirring occasionally, about 4 minutes.
4. Add black beans, cooked pasta, and mango to the skillet. Stir together.
5. Remove from heat when beans are heated through. Serve.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
